---
title: "Data exploration"
external-env: true
---

```{python .marimo}
import marimo as mo
import pandas as pd
import altair as alt
```

This example explores the Palmer Penguins dataset. It uses 
`marimo` with `altair`. 

Use the dropdowns to select dimensions used for $x$-and $y$-coordinates and color. 

```{python .marimo}
df = pd.read_csv("https://raw.githubusercontent.com/mcnakhaee/palmerpenguins/refs/heads/master/palmerpenguins/data/penguins.csv")

NUMERICAL_COLUMNS = ['bill_length_mm', 'bill_depth_mm' , 'flipper_length_mm' , 'body_mass_g']
CATEGORICAL_COLUMNS = ['species', 'island', 'sex']

```

```{python .marimo}

dropdown_options = list(df.keys())

x_axis = mo.ui.dropdown(options=NUMERICAL_COLUMNS, value=NUMERICAL_COLUMNS[0], label='x')
y_axis = mo.ui.dropdown(options=NUMERICAL_COLUMNS, value=NUMERICAL_COLUMNS[1], label='y')
color = mo.ui.dropdown(options=CATEGORICAL_COLUMNS, value=CATEGORICAL_COLUMNS[0], label='Color')


mo.hstack([x_axis, y_axis, color])
```

```{python .marimo}
source = df

base = alt.Chart(source, width=600, height=400)
base_bar = base.mark_bar(opacity=0.3, binSpacing=0)

points = base.mark_circle().encode(
    alt.X(x_axis.value).scale(zero=False),
    alt.Y(y_axis.value).scale(zero=False),
    color=color.value,
)

top_hist = (
    base_bar
    .encode(
        alt.X(f"{x_axis.value}:Q")
            .bin(maxbins=20).stack(None).title(""),
        alt.Y("count()").stack(None).title(""),
        alt.Color(f"{color.value}:N"),
    )
    .properties(height=60)
)

right_hist = (
    base_bar
    .encode(
        alt.Y(f"{y_axis.value}:Q")
            .bin(maxbins=20)
            .stack(None)
            .title(""),
        alt.X("count()").stack(None).title(""),
        alt.Color(f"{color.value}:N"),
    )
    .properties(width=60)
)

mo.center(mo.ui.altair_chart(top_hist & (points | right_hist)))
```

```{python .marimo}
df
```
